## Sanitized Details

Do not paste real proxy passwords, API keys, cookies, QR codes, or raw reports.
Replace them with examples like `proxy.example.com:8000:user:<password>`.


## Checks Tried

- [ ] One-click diagnosis
- [ ] Proxy precheck
- [ ] Rollback / restore original network settings
